value.found_quote: By default, the agent runs with network access turned off. ... Domain rules are allowlist-first: - Exact hosts match only themselves. ... domains = { "api.openai.com" = "allow", "example.com" = "deny" }
value.rationale: The page explicitly states network access is off by default ("By default, the agent runs with network access turned off") and describes restricting it to a domain allow list via the network_proxy feature with allowlist-first domain rules. This directly substantiates the claim.
